title: The Black Keys - Live at Main Square Festival
subTitle: Main Square Festival is a music festival that takes place in Arras, France, lasting three days.

title: Eric Clapton & Steve Winwood - Live from Madison Square Garden
subTitle: History rocked and rock made history during a sold-out 3-gig stand at Madison Square Garden in February 2008 when Eric Clapton and Steve Winwood performed a concert together for the first time since their days in the legendary Blind Faith in 1969.

title: Rock Legends
subTitle: Fronted by Eric Clapton, Cream was the prototypical power trio, playing a mix of blues, rock and psychedelia while focusing on chunky riffs and fiery guitar solos.

title: Rock Legends
subTitle: British singer/songwriter Elvis Costello extended the lyrical range of punk and new wave music with songs like Alison, Everyday I Write the Book and Veronica. Leading music critics cast fresh light on the career of the Eagles.

title: Rock Legends
subTitle: With his signature vocal hiccup and hits like That'll Be the Day, Rave On, Peggy Sue and Not Fade Away, Buddy Holly was a rock & roll pioneer, as well as one of the genre's first great singer-songwriters.

title: Rock Legends
subTitle: Chuck Berry was one of the most influential rock 'n' roll performers in music history. He's known for songs including Maybellene and Johnny B. Goode.

title: Celine Dion - Taking Chances World Tour
subTitle: Part of the world tour of Celine Dion, which was seen by more than 3 million people and covered 5 continents, 25 countries and 92 cities - the first tour in nine years that was an absolute success.

title: The Killers - Live at Rock Am Ring
subTitle: The Killers perform at Rock Am Ring, a music festival that takes place annually at the Nürburgring Race Track in Western Germany, with tracks like When You Were Young and The World We Live In.

title: Adele - iTunes Festival: Live in London
subTitle: Adele, a prominent English singer, performs some of her most iconic popular songs in front of a live audience in london.

title: Justin Timberlake - Live from New York
subTitle: The FutureSex/LoveSounds album, which spawned the tour FutureSex/LoveShow, is one of the most awarded 2007 albums and has sold more than eight million copies worldwide.

title: Of Monsters and Men - Main Square Festival 2013
subTitle: The Icelandic band Of Monsters and Men perform a fun and entertaining set in sunny Arras, France. The folk story-tellers hit all the right notes!

title: Jimi Hendrix - Electric Church: Atlanta Pop Festival
subTitle: Electric Church presents Jimi Hendrix in full flight at the 1970 Atlanta Pop Festival before the largest U.S. audience of his career.

title: The Moody Blues - Days of Future Passed Live
subTitle: This film, capturing an electric evening at The Sony Centre, Toronto, where the band was joined on stage by a full orchestra for the first time ever, is the definitive performance the album Days of Future Passed.

title: Coldplay - Austin City Limits
subTitle: The Austin City Limits Music Festival is an annual music festival that takes place at Zilker Park in Austin, Texas. The festival features more than 130 bands on eight stages for three days.

title: Ziggy Marley - Live at the Filmore
subTitle: The Fillmore Auditorium is a historic concert hall in San Francisco, California. Founded by Bill Graham, it was named after being located originally on the corners of Fillmore Street and Geary Boulevard.

title: Usher - Omg Tour (Live from London)
subTitle: Treating the crowd at London's O2 Arena to his signature brand of R;B infused pop, Usher performed hits from recent albums Versus and Raymond V. Raymond, including DJ Got Us Falling in Love, There Goes My Baby, and OMG,.

title: Ben Harper & Relentless 7 - Live at Metro Theatre
subTitle: A natural born showman, a slide-guitar legend, Ben Harper accompanied by the Relentless7 at the Metro Theatre in Sydney. Regardless of it having been filmed in 2009, this show was such a stand out favorite of ours there was no question that it was...

title: BLACKPINK - The Show
subTitle: The Show opened with Kill This Love, following a video featuring sights of dark and empty cities around the world.[9] Apart from live performances it also included several pre-recorded tracks.

title: Avril Lavigne - Live in Calgary
subTitle: The Canadian Avril Lavigne enchanted the public in 2007 at her show in Calgary (Canada), in which she released the album The Best Damn Thing, which sold, that same year, more than 6 million copies worldwide.

title: Tom Petty & The Heartbreakers - Live at Soundstage
subTitle: Filmed live from the Vic Theatre, Chicago, Illinois, USA in April 2003 for the 'Soundstage' TV series.

title: Paul McCartney - The Space Within US
subTitle: Paul McCartney presents this special performance of the US Tour, made in the United States, 11 weeks and 34 shows, playing great compositions of his solo career along with some Wings and Beatles songs.

title: Red Hot Chili Peppers: Live at Tokyo Dome 2023
subTitle: Red Hot Chili Peppers perform after the return of John Frusciante, who is in Japan for the first time in 16 years.

title: Metallica - Orion Festival: Tour Through the Never
subTitle: Filmed at Orion Festival, Atlantic City, this concert film will give all fans a spectacular Live experience from start to finish. Classic Metallica featuring unforgettable version of their hits: 'One', 'Master Of Puppets', 'Sad But True' and more.

title: Ozzy Osbourne: God Bless Ozzy Osbourne
subTitle: God Bless Ozzy Osbourne tells for the first time the story of his career from the founding of Black Sabbath through to solo stardom and his wider fame beyond.

title: Qello Concerts' Best
subTitle: The best of Qello Concerts.

subTitle: ITunes Festival, is an annual music festival that takes place over a month in London. Sponsored by Apple Inc., it had its first edition in 2007.

title: Annie Lennox - An Evening of Nostalgia
subTitle: An Evening Of Nostalgia with Annie Lennox captures one of music's most popular and acclaimed artists in her only full concert performance of songs from her Grammy-nominated Nostalgia album.

title: Sting - Bring On The Night
subTitle: Documents the preparation and rehearsals for Sting's first solo concert, as well as his supporting band's opinions on their leader and his controversial efforts.

subTitle: Grateful Dead, mixed genres such as psychadelia, blues, folk, country, rock 'n' roll and jazz to create their incredibly unique rock sound.

title: Tom Petty - Rock Legends

title: Milky Chance - Live Garorock Festival 2017
subTitle: The German duet is back and better than ever! Milky Chance is the success story of two school friends, Clemens Rehbein and Philipp Dausch. After a long break, 2017 marks the release of a second, long-waited, album Blossom.

subTitle: Filmed at Roundhouse, London, this concert film will give all fans a spectacular Live experience from start to finish. Britney Spears performs her hits including Baby One More Time, Oops! I Did It Again, Toxic and many more.

title: LL Cool J - Countdown Concert
subTitle: James Todd Smith III, best known by the stage name of LL Cool J, is an American hip-hop artist and actor. He is best known for his romantic ballads.

title: One Direction - Apple Music Festival
subTitle: One Direction performs a stellar set at the 2015 edition of the Apple Music Festival. Be prepared to sing along to their catchy chart-topping hits!

title: Lana Del Rey - Live in London 2012
subTitle: Born to Die is the second album by singer-songwriter Lana Del Rey, and the first to be officially released on January 27, 2012 and that would lead to global success; In countries such as the United Kingdom the album was the best selling of that year.
